title: Double Digits
description: First character hits level 10. The party notices, sort of.

steps.text: Somewhere between the tenth slime and the eleventh, something in the air shifted. Nobody mentioned it. They kept walking.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: It's the arithmetic. Level ten. There's a numerology about it.

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: I don't feel stronger. I feel... noted.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: Something is counting, and it ticked over.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: Whatever it is, it was counting before we noticed. That's the part I keep coming back to.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: Can we ignore it for a bit?

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: We can try. The counter has its own schedule.

steps.text: They ignored it. The counter ticked anyway.
